name: Chicken Breasts Roma
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Mushrooms, sliced and cut into sticks
1/2 cup Red wine or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken between sheets of plastic wrap. Pound with a flat mallet until the chicken is 8 inches in diameter.
2. Press together any holes in the chicken breasts.
3. In a large skillet, sauté sausage over medium heat until cooked through. Skim off excess fat but leave the drippings in the pan.
4. Spread half of the sausage on each chicken breast and top with one cheese stick.
5. Roll up each chicken breast, encasing the sausage and cheese. Fold the sides securely.
6. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, oregano, and black pepper.
7. Coat the chicken breasts in the seasoned flour mixture.
8. Remove the chicken and wipe the pan clean with paper towels.
9. Return the chicken to the pan. Add olive oil and drippings from the skillet.
10. Stir in onion, peppers, mushrooms, tomatoes, wine, basil, and black pepper.
11. Cover and simmer over low heat for 25 to 30 minutes.
12. Serve immediately.
